name: Wimarn Din
overview: Thayawat Thepsathit is the Managing Director of the KPT Group of Companies. Thayawat falls in love with Yanang, but lately he doesn't have much time. He focused on work until he forgot about his heart. Not long after, Uppakarn quietly returned from abroad. He met Yanang at the airport and was very impressed with her. When Thayawat offered him a job, he refused, saying he wanted to gain experience in Thailand first and then travel around, living a lavish life and having different partners.

trailers.title: วิมานดิน Trailer1
